title: Review: implement all backends + fixes
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Two API surface locks (SigningAlgorithm not non_exhaustive, cache_key param on trait) will constrain future evolution. One repeating issue class (aws-kms 4096-byte limit). Bitwarden token expiry will generate support questions. No hard security bugs found.
Confidence: 12% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not read gcp-sm, azure-kv, bitwarden, doppler in full — relied on subagent summaries; (2) did not trace all error paths in vaultrs library call; (3) did not run tests. Would raise confidence if: run full test suite, inspect gcp-sm token handling under reqwest debug logging, read azure-kv credential chain implementation in full.
